title: Supervisor-Agent Phase 3: Live Subagent Delegation Report

phase3_live.description: Actual subprocess delegation via Hermes CLI

research_delegation.query: Find 3 recent papers on LLM agents

code_delegation.query: Write a Python factorial function with docstring and type hints

comparison.improvement: From zero real delegation to validated live delegation across 2 intent categories
